  u_set = Set(nums.to_a)
  
  total_sum = 0_i64

```javascript
function solve(nums) {
    // 1. Get U_set, the set of unique elements of nums.
    const U_set = new Set(nums);
    
    let totalSum = 0;
    
    // 2. For each x in nums:
    for (const x of nums) {
        let vx = x; // Initialize the minimum reducible value to x itself
        
        // 3a, 3b, 3c, 3d: Find all divisors d of x and check if d is in U_set.
        
        // Iterate up to sqrt(x)
        const limit = Math.floor(Math.sqrt(x));
        
        for (let i = 1; i <= limit; i++) {
            if (x % i === 0) {
                // i is a divisor
                const d1 = i;
                
                // Check d1
                if (U_set.has(d1)) {
                    vx = Math.min(vx, d1);
                }
                
                // d2 = x / i is the pair divisor
                const d2 = x / i;
                
                // Check d2, unless d1 == d2 (perfect square case)
                if (d1 !== d2 && U_set.has(d2)) {
                    vx = Math.min(vx, d2);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 3e. Add vx to total_sum.
        totalSum += vx;
    }
    
    return totalSum;
}
```
